data.name: Tricolour Lovestory
data.detailed_description:
——那是，朝思夜想也未嘗得到的自由
 ——那是，至今為止都不曾體會的懵懂
——那是，將我們三色交織在一起的繪卷

◆STORY◆
2005年，江城的暖秋。
童年有如被鐵籠囚住一般，早已被灰色浸染的男孩，
第一次走進名為「藝術班」的教室之中。
兩個色彩截然不同的少女，
同時伸出雙手——
相會、再會、交織、著色……
來不及找到心中的那抹繽紛，
男孩已經提起畫筆。
「……「一起畫畫」啊……」
「……嘿嘿，現在是我們三個人呢……」

◆CHARACTOR◆

 文 芷 wen zhi
CV：朱雀橙
Birthday:Oct.7 Height:162cm Weight:51kg
B：96(D) W：60 H：87
本作的女主角之一，17 歲讀高二。
和主角一樣同為藝術班的插班生，並且恰巧成為了同桌。
紫水晶一般的深邃雙瞳、柔順的黑色長發、文靜可愛的側臉，還有走在哪裡都會引人注意的胸圍，這麼一位“冰山美人”——
面對來自同桌的問候，她一開始以極其冷淡的方式作為回應。這種不合群的一面也很快激起了其他同學的排斥和不解。
老師眼中，文芷是一個繪畫天才，美術實力在整個地區名利前茅。但與其外表和在畫紙上顯露的氣質不符的是，日常生活中的她經常沒什麼主見。可能也是因為這個，她的畫中似乎缺失了些什麼。


墨 小菊 Mo Xiaoju
CV：小N
Birthday: Aug.10 Height:157cm Weight:44kg
B：82(A) W：58 H：85
本作的女主角之一，17 歲讀高二。
性格陽光活潑，十分要強那種，很少直率地說出心裡話。
作為住在同一個小區的青梅竹馬，從七歲起便和主角相識。而且自小以來對他就有著不太一般的保護欲，明知年歲較小卻總強行自稱姐姐。在主角被父母關在家裡的那段黑暗的時間，是最值得依靠的知心好友。
因為某些原因，現在和主角處於「絕交」的狀態之中。

◆SYSTEM◆

●史上首創，利用雲好感度的“三學家系統”搭載：
遊戲採用好感度系統、免費更新與DLC續寫故事。用戶的每一次選擇，都會刷新雲端服務器的計數器，並以簡單易懂得形式即時反饋到特設頁面。一個人的力量雖然渺小，只要齊心協力，一定可以改寫未來，讓喜歡的姑娘獲得幸福。

◆STAGE◆

●江城武漢 Wuhan - the River City
中國中部地區中心城市，別稱“江城”。城市口號是“武漢，每天不一樣”。


●師貳高級中學 Wuhan No.12 High School
創建於1954年的省級示範高中。每年級設有一個藝術班。

卡牌：根據steam新政策，卡牌會在遊戲發行後達到一定的指標後掉落。

data.short_description: 時光一逝永不回，往事只能回味。 100萬字劇本+全程語音+100張CG的這部高中題材戀愛遊戲彷彿帶你回到學生時代，再經歷一次高中戀愛生活。那一天，你失去了她；那一天，她和她同時向你伸出了雙手，你不再孤身一人。此後，你的每一個選擇決定了是在歡聲笑語中打出GG，還是在這裡完成了人生的遺憾！
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: Intel Core2DUO 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX9.0 VRAM128MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM

data.name: Tricolour Lovestory
data.detailed_description:
——It is the freedom, that one’s been longing for a lifetime. ——It is the simple of mind, that one’s never released from its shackle.——It is the emaki, that we all paint our own color on.

  ◆STORY◆
  It was the fall of 2005, weather here in the River City was warm and lovely.
 His childhood is like a pair of handcuffs, shackled the boy like he was soaked in dark grey paint.Entering the classroom called 「Fine Art」,  
he saw 2 girls who auras out entirely different colors, embraced him at the same time.He almost say the auras encountered, twined, parted, and twined again……The young man was fascinated, before he could even reach his inner self. 「……How about we paint something together……」「……all three of us, from now on……」

  ◆CHARACTORS◆
   
◆Violet◆   
 CV：朱雀橙
 Birthday:Oct.7th    Height:162cm    Weight:51kg
 B：96(D)    W：60   H：87  
One of the main characters, 17 and in her junior year.
 Like the young man, she was also a transfer student, and happened to sit by his side.  With eyes deep like amethysts, dark silk-like hair a face of perfect beauty but cold as ice, and mesmerizing bosom, she drew attention wherever she went.
 An ‘Ice Queen’ like her, responded nothing after the young man greeted her. And because of this, she wasn’t the most popular one among her classmates.  
But in the professor’s point of view, Violet was an absolute wizard of brushes. She worked her magic on a canvas like no one ever seen before. But her art was quite distinguished from her personality and seemed missing something crucial. What would that be? What would that be?

   
◆Daisy◆
 CV：小N  Birthday: Aug.10th     Height:157cm  Weight:44kg
 B：82(A)    W：58    H：85  
One of the main characters, 17 and in her junior year.
 She always light up the room with her bright smile. But not always speaks her mind.  She had lived in the same block with the young man, and had known him for 10 years. She always tried to protect him. And though she was the younger one, she insisted on acting more mature. And when he was locked up by his parents, he could always count on her.
 But for some reasons, she is on 「NOT TALKING」 term with him.

   ◆SYSTEM◆
      

 ●Your decisions will guide the game to come!
 The game carried the original, unprecedented system which basically uploads your every choice to our cloud sever, and shows the result to all after data was gathered and calculated on our page. So the ending isn’t final yet, and the rest is for you to write.

   ◆STAGE◆
      

 ●Wuhan - the River City
 A beautiful city in central China, also known as ‘The River City’. Everyday here is a new and promising day.

     

 ●Wuhan No.12 High School
 Found in 1954, a prominent high school, and has a group of students studies Fine Art every grade.

Trading cards: According to new policy of Steam, trading cards will be available when the quantity of copies of game sold reachs a certain amount.

Trading cards: According to new policy of Steam, trading cards will be available when the quantity of copies of game sold reachs a certain amount.
data.short_description: Time flies and never comes back. But with an incredible 1-million-word script and 100+ original CGs, this game will take you back to when you were young, simple and pure. Go and get the love of your life back, start something new, or end everything in flame, that's for you to decide!
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WIN7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • Processor: Intel Core2DUO 2GHz
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX9.0 VRAM128MB
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM
